message:
test(runtime): raise undo/history.rs coverage with 10 new tests (bd-3pwxq)

Add tests for uncovered paths:
- try_merge early exit when merge_text() returns None
- try_merge rejection when accept_merge() returns false
- Memory accounting after successful merge
- max_bytes=0 means unlimited (no eviction)
- Depth and byte limits enforced simultaneously
- Undo/redo return description strings
- Clear resets memory with items on both stacks
- Depth limit edge cases (limit=1, limit=0)
- HistoryConfig Debug and Clone traits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
